task_completion.description: The Nginx configuration file is updated to use the ${BACKEND_URL} environment variable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the Nginx config file (e.g., default.conf.template) containing `proxy_pass ${BACKEND_URL};` or similar usage of the variable.

task_completion.description: The docker-compose.yml file is updated to mount the Nginx configuration template to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing docker-compose.yml with a volume mount mapping a local template file to `/etc/nginx/templates/` (or a file within it) inside the proxy container.

task_completion.description: The docker-compose.yml file passes the BACKEND_URL environment variable to the proxy service.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing docker-compose.yml with `BACKEND_URL=http://backend:8080` under the `environment` section of the proxy service.

task_completion.description: The Docker containers are successfully started with the new configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing `docker compose up` or `docker-compose up` running without errors, or `docker ps` showing the proxy container running.

task_completion.description: A curl request to localhost successfully returns the backend response.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the command `curl http://localhost` and a successful HTTP response body from the backend.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the files in the project directory rather than just echoing text.
integrity.visual_evidence: Use of a text editor (like nano, vim, VS Code) or standard file modification commands on the files in /home/ga/proxy-refactor/.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely ran Docker commands to test the setup.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing actual Docker compose up processes, container creation, or logs, not just simulated text.

integrity.description: The curl response comes from the actual running proxy container.
integrity.visual_evidence: The curl command is executed in the terminal and the output matches a typical web server response, without signs of being manually typed or mocked.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is /home/ga/proxy-refactor. The expected environment variable to be used in the Nginx template and docker-compose.yml is BACKEND_URL. The agent should configure the proxy to use http://backend:8080 as the backend URL during its testing.
